mods.name: Boost Controller
mods.description: A manual or electronic boost controller lets you safely increase boost pressure on the stock CT20 twin-turbo setup for immediate power gains.
mods.partNumbers: GReddy Profec B Spec II, HKS EVC 7
mods.installNotes: Tap into the wastegate vacuum line. Start at stock boost (10 psi) and increase in 1 psi increments. Monitor knock with a wideband gauge. Stock internals handle 15 psi safely.

mods.name: Downpipe and Front Pipe
mods.description: Replace the restrictive factory downpipe and front pipe for dramatically improved exhaust flow and turbo spool on the 2JZ-GTE.
mods.installNotes: Unbolt from the turbo outlet and catalytic converter. New pipe bolts directly in place. 1.5 hour job on a lift. Significant power gain when combined with a boost increase.

mods.name: Catback Exhaust
mods.description: A full catback exhaust system reduces backpressure and gives the 2JZ its signature deep, smooth inline-6 turbo exhaust note.
mods.installNotes: Bolt-on from the mid-pipe back. Single or dual exit options available. Hangs on factory mounts. No cutting required. 1 hour install.

mods.name: Single Turbo Conversion
mods.description: Replace the sequential twin-turbo setup with a single, larger turbocharger. The most popular A80 Supra mod, unlocking 500–800hp potential.
mods.partNumbers: Precision 6766 turbo kit, CX Racing Single Turbo Kit
mods.installNotes: Remove factory twins and exhaust manifold. Install new manifold and single turbo. Requires fuel system upgrades (injectors + fuel pump), ECU tune, and upgraded intercooler piping. 15+ hour install.

mods.name: Upgraded Fuel System
mods.description: Larger injectors and a higher-flow fuel pump are essential for supporting increased boost and power beyond 400hp on the 2JZ-GTE.
mods.installNotes: Drop the fuel tank to replace the in-tank pump. Swap injectors in the fuel rail — apply fresh O-rings. Requires ECU retune to calibrate new injector flow rates.

mods.name: Standalone ECU
mods.description: Replace the factory ECU with a standalone engine management system for full control over fueling, ignition, and boost. Required for big-power 2JZ builds.
mods.installNotes: Wire standalone ECU into factory harness using a PnP adapter or custom harness. Requires professional dyno tuning for all load points. Disable factory immobilizer. Budget 10+ hours for install and base tune.

mods.name: Built 2JZ Bottom End
mods.description: Forged pistons, rods, and upgraded head studs prepare the legendary 2JZ for 800–1500hp builds. The cast iron block itself handles tremendous power.
mods.partNumbers: Brian Crower BC6058 rods, CP Pistons SC7463, ARP 203-4205 head studs
mods.installNotes: Full engine-out rebuild. Machine block, install forged internals, deck block, and torque head studs to spec. Requires new bearings, gaskets, and timing belt. 40+ hours including machine work.

mods.name: Upgraded Transmission (T56 Swap)
mods.description: The factory Getrag V160 is strong but expensive to replace. A T56 Magnum swap provides a cost-effective 6-speed solution rated for 700+ lb-ft.
mods.partNumbers: Tremec T56 Magnum, Collins Adapter Kit MK-T56
mods.installNotes: Requires adapter plate, custom driveshaft, and clutch hydraulic conversion. Shifter location is close to factory. Budget 20+ hours. Far cheaper than replacing a broken V160.
